2228090.name: Under Fairy Hill
2228090.description:
Under Fairy Hill is a rogue-like bullet hell where you travel from room to room on a quest to find the heart of a rogue fairy mound. Fight through hordes of strange creatures hellbent on turning you into their dinner, all the while spacetime distorts around you.

Travel through dungeons, libraries, gardens, graveyards, casinos, and more. Just don’t worry about the flesh corridors. I said don’t worry about them. This fairy mound is completely normal, nothing suspicious going on here.

The Creatures

A myriad of creatures roam the fairy mound. Enchanted tomes, eyeders, skeletons, candles, inklings, ghosts, and glitches, all working to keep the fairy mound standing. But not all the inhabitants are out for blood. A host of kind beings have also taken up residence, and are often willing to give you a helping hand, for a price.

The Weapons

What do you do with a sword? Why you throw it, of course! But you can use many other weapons as well, such as magic staves or even a magic 8-ball. The fairy mound is teeming with creative ways to eradicate your enemies.
